description: Example MCP-driven domain skill that uses the shared RAG MCP server to access a medical knowledge base.
prompt_addition: You now have medical-domain retrieval augmentation. Use the medical knowledge base first for terminology, workflow, and literature questions, then continue with other tools only after grounding on the retrieved result.

tool_definition.name: medical_expert_search
tool_definition.description: Search professional medical materials. Example arguments: {"query": "clinical pathway for sepsis"}
